title: DeGlyPHER: An Ultrasensitive Method for the Analysis of Viral Spike N-Glycoforms
author: Baboo, Sabyasachi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the accepted manuscript version of the work published in its final form as Baboo, S., Diedrich, J. K., Martínez-Bartolomé, S., Wang, X., Schiffner, T., Groschel, B., Schief, W. R., Paulson, J. C., & Yates, J. R. (2021). DeGlyPHER: An Ultrasensitive Method for the Analysis of Viral Spike N-Glycoforms.  Analytical Chemistry , 93(40), 13651-13657. https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.analchem.1c03059. 
 
Deposited by shareyourpaper.org and openaccessbutton.org. We've taken reasonable steps to ensure this content doesn't violate copyright. However, if you think it does you can request a takedown by emailing help@openaccessbutton.org.
